case_title: CHIN, ALLEN vs. LEE, WILLIAM W.

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHIN, ALLEN AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, WILLIAM W. SUMMONS ISSUED
